tracks.meaning: a narrow opening or groove in a surface designed to hold or guide something
a designated position or time segment in a computer's memory or processing schedule
a machine or device that dispenses items or outcomes based on chance, such as a slot machine
a reserved time or position in a broadcast, performance schedule, or programme
an allocated position or opportunity available within an organization or system
a position or role assigned to a player on a team
to insert or fit something into a slot or narrow opening
a narrow opening or fissure in a bone or bodily structure
a narrow gorge or canyon carved by water erosion through rock formations
a person's current position, job, or role in a social or professional hierarchy
